news.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, influential lawmaker and Trump ally,  dies at 71 after a brief illness
news.summary: Sen. Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, had just returned from a trip to Ukraine. Graham is a frequent critic of President Barack Obama.

news.title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
news.summary: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.

news.title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
news.summary: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey.

news.title: ‘Almost unlimited’: Execs says AI demand remains strong even as enterprises move to ‘valuemaxxing’
news.summary: AI-related chip stocks have been volatile amid a debate over AI demand and spending. AI-related chips have been a key part of the tech sector for decades.

news.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
news.summary: At-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks. Following a wave of price hikes, at- home pastimes such as streaming movies and video games have become more expensive.

news.title: Earnings estimates have been following an unusual pattern this time around
news.summary: Thanks to the energy and tech sectors, expectations have actually climbed heading into second-quarter results. Analysts generally lower their estimates in the months before earnings.

news.title: The No. 1 decision for aging retirees: Stay at home or move into a senior community?
news.summary: CNN.com will feature iReporter photos in a weekly Travel Snapshots gallery. Visit CNN.com/Travel each week for a new gallery of snapshots from around the world.

news.title: The stock-market rally now hinges more on AI than oil
news.summary: AI investment remains front and center. As earnings season kicks off, AI investment is back in the spotlight. It's a hot topic in the tech industry, especially in Silicon Valley.

news.title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
news.summary: “My house shook violently from the wind,” she said. “I’ve never seen anything like it’s been.”

news.title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
news.summary: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions,” she says. “I’m not rich. I’ve never been rich.”
